name: io.github.netixc/stremio-mcp
title: Stremio MCP Server
description: Search, play, and control Stremio on Android TV over native ADB.

environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_TV_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Android TV IP address for playback and device control

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TMDB API key for title search

environmentVariables.name: STREMIO_AUTH_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stremio account token for library reads and writes

environmentVariables.name: ADB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the native ADB executable
